criteria.name: Problem Alignment
criteria.description: Does the prompt address the actual task in the problem statement? A generic prompt that could apply to any task scores low.

criteria.name: Specificity
criteria.description: Constraints, context, desired output format, edge cases, and audience are specified where relevant.

criteria.name: Clarity
criteria.description: Instructions are unambiguous with no contradictory asks.

criteria.name: Structure
criteria.description: Logical organization: role, task, constraints, and output format are clearly separated.

criteria.name: Actionability
criteria.description: An LLM could execute the prompt without guessing missing details.

criteria.name: Technique
criteria.description: Effective prompting patterns (examples, delimiters, step-by-step) without unnecessary bloat.
